backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the generic 'greater metro area' phrasing was replaced with 'Serving Marshall, Longview, Jefferson & Surrounding Areas, Texas' in Hero.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and notable changes, including color system, component descriptions, and service area text updates.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer components.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section featuring an owner portrait with overlay, bio paragraphs, and a highlights grid with icons for credentials like licensed, insured, and locally owned.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Dark-themed contact section with four info cards (phone, email, service area set to Marshall/Longview/Jefferson, hours) and a quote request form.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick nav links, contact details showing the East Texas service area, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, overlay, headline, subheadline, dual CTA buttons, trust stats, and a service area badge reading 'Serving Marshall, Longview, Jefferson & Surrounding Areas, Texas'.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar for a landscaping site with smooth-scroll links, scroll-based background change, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of eight landscaping service cards with icons and descriptions, plus a CTA banner at the bottom.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, OKLCH CSS custom properties for an earthy green theme (light and dark), and a texture utility class.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (forest, soil, cream), serif/sans font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 9) for a static landscaping company website, recording existing features, known issues (lingering 'greater metro area' text), and pending fix requests to replace generic metro area phrasing with specific Texas city names.
